description: Remote full-time Flutter mobile engineering role posted 2 days ago. Requires 3+ years software development, 2+ years Flutter and Dart, mobile application development, API integration, backend familiarity, and strong problem-solving and collaboration. Tools mentioned include Flutter, Dart, Android, Swift, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, Firebase, GraphQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, GitHub, and CircleCI.

Remote full-time mobile app engineering role posted 1 week ago for Eventeny, a cloud platform for managing large-scale festivals and events. Requires a bachelor's degree, 1 to 2+ years of mobile development experience, proficiency in Flutter and PHP, RESTful API experience, and strong UI/UX understanding.

Remote full-time senior mobile engineering role posted 2 weeks ago. Requires 5+ years of mobile development, 2+ years native Android or iOS, 2+ years Flutter, mobile architecture experience, testing strategies, AI-enabled features, and strong collaboration. Tools mentioned include Flutter, Android SDK, iOS SDK, Git, and CI/CD.

Remote full-time senior mobile software engineering role posted 4 days ago. Requires a bachelor's or master's degree in computer science or engineering, 7 to 10 years in cross-platform mobile development, shipping large-scale apps and SDKs, experience with React Native, Flutter, or Xamarin, JavaScript, Dart, Swift, Kotlin, Firebase, Git, Agile delivery, UI/UX, REST, and strong teamwork.
